Class TelemetryRuleController

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.telemetry.TelemetryRuleController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/v1") public class TelemetryRuleController extends Object
REST API for telemetry monitoring rules (TelemetryRuleService). Rules belong to a resource (they watch one of its data points), so creation and listing are nested under the resource; a rule is then addressed by its own id. Authorization is enforced in the service against the owning resource (READ to read, UPDATE to mutate); GlobalExceptionHandler maps the thrown exceptions to status codes (404/403/400).
Author:
peter haller

    createRule(Long resourceId, TelemetryRuleRequest request, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Creates a monitoring rule on a resource.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void>
    deleteRule(Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Deletes a rule.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TelemetryRuleDTO>

    Returns a single rule by id.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<TelemetryRuleDTO>>
    getRules(Long resourceId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Lists all monitoring rules of a resource (any data point, enabled or not).
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TelemetryRuleDTO>
    updateRule(Long id, TelemetryRuleRequest patch, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Partially updates a rule (only the fields present in the body are changed).

  • Method Details

    • createRule

      @PostMapping("/resources/{resourceId}/telemetry-rules") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TelemetryRuleDTO> createRule(@PathVariable Long resourceId, @RequestBody TelemetryRuleRequest request, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Creates a monitoring rule on a resource.
      Returns:
      201 Created with the new rule

    • getRules

      @GetMapping("/resources/{resourceId}/telemetry-rules") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<TelemetryRuleDTO>> getRules(@PathVariable Long resourceId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Lists all monitoring rules of a resource (any data point, enabled or not).
      Returns:
      200 OK with the rules

    • getRule

      @GetMapping("/telemetry-rules/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TelemetryRuleDTO> getRule(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Returns a single rule by id.
      Returns:
      200 OK with the rule

    • updateRule

      @PatchMapping("/telemetry-rules/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TelemetryRuleDTO> updateRule(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestBody TelemetryRuleRequest patch, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Partially updates a rule (only the fields present in the body are changed).
      Returns:
      200 OK with the updated rule

    • deleteRule

      @DeleteMapping("/telemetry-rules/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteRule(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
      Deletes a rule.
      Returns:
      204 No Content
